mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO article_chunk (article_id, chunk_index, content, embedding, token_count) VALUES
(#{chunk.articleId}, #{chunk.chunkIndex}, #{chunk.content}, #{chunk.embedding}, #{chunk.tokenCount})
mapper.select: SELECT ac.id, ac.article_id, ac.chunk_index, ac.content, ac.embedding, ac.token_count FROM article_chunk ac INNER JOIN article a ON ac.article_id = a.id WHERE a.status = 1

SELECT id, article_id, chunk_index, content, embedding, token_count FROM article_chunk WHERE article_id IN
#{articleId}
